author: y4rr
content: Result: Added 3 PTX kernels (gelu_tanh_kernel, gelu_erf_kernel, gelu_backward_tanh_kernel), 3 gpu_* functions with CPU fallbacks, 3 GpuBackend trait methods (gelu_tanh_f32, gelu_erf_f32, gelu_backward_tanh_f32), 3 CudaBackendImpl overrides, and updated gelu_with() forward dispatch to route all 3 modes (Sigmoid/Tanh/None) to GPU for f32 CUDA tensors. All 3200+ tests pass.
